## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution or feature.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## PRD Reference

If this feature is already in the [PRD](../../docs/prd.md), reference the relevant FR number or Epic.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, screenshots, or mockups.
